title: apply degrades character arguments to raw integers (codepoints)
goal: Sweep E re-verification (2026-07-03, master 0733dc9b) promotes the edge-matrix EM-5 finding to a tracked ledger entry (previously only in tests/edge_matrix/found + KNOWN_FAILURES). Characters passed through apply lose their tag and arrive as raw integer codepoints: (apply (lambda (x) x) (list #\a)) yields 97 not #\a, and (char? ...) of that is #f. map/list/vector round-trips preserve char; ONLY the apply argument-unpacking path degrades the tag. Reproduces under -r AND AOT. Fails edge-matrix pair060_chars__first_class and pair065_chars__variadic (both modes), the only remaining edge-matrix allowlist entries.
acceptance: pair060_chars__first_class and pair065_chars__variadic removed from KNOWN_FAILURES and pass
campaign_payoff: apply is the universal call primitive; silently converting char args to ints corrupts any char-processing code routed through apply.

verifications.evidence: EM5 prints '97 #f' (expected 'a #t') under -r and AOT; edge-matrix pair060/pair065 ASSERT-FAIL both modes.
